page_content: Internships TLPL 479G (https://app.testudo.umd.edu/soc/search/? courseId=TLPL479G) (Field Experiences in Education; Internship) Taken in the spring of the junior year, this course is the third of ﬁve ﬁeld-based professional experiences for students who have been accepted into the Elementary Education Teacher Preparation Program. Interns will assist the mentor teacher in the planning, delivery and assessment of instruction and become familiar with the various roles a teacher plays in the teaching-learning process. The internship is an integral component of this semester and includes three immersion weeks in addition to the two full school days each week in a public elementary school classroom.
